title: dianthus graminifolius
intro: Dianthus graminifolius, also known as the grass-leaved pink or pink grass pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Dianthus graminifolius has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used for centuries in traditional medicine.
